description: A specific custom, belief, or practice passed down through generations. It is a single, structured thread within the broader tapestry of heritage.
rationale: A composition of the roots 'the' (deliberate), 're' (bridge, structured relation), and 'ma' (grounded). The word's structure suggests 'a deliberate, grounded bridge,' framing tradition as a conscious structure that connects the past to the present. It is more specific than 'thanoa' (heritage).
